raw_output: {"predictions":[{"common_name":"Painted Bunting","scientific_name":"Passerina ciris","rank_hint":"species","confidence":0.95,"field_marks":"Male with vivid blue head, red underparts, green back and wings; standing at water's edge with reflection visible."},{"common_name":"Indigo Bunting","scientific_name":"Passerina cyanea","rank_hint":"species","confidence":0.1,"field_marks":"Entirely blue male, but lacks red and green plumage; unlikely given coloration."},{"common_name":"Varied Bunting","scientific_name":"Passerina versicolor","rank_hint":"species","confidence":0.05,"field_marks":"Male has purplish-blue head and rufous underparts, but typically less green on back; rare in eastern US."},{"common_name":"Blue Grosbeak","scientific_name":"Passerina caerulea","rank_hint":"species","confidence":0.03,"field_marks":"Larger, uniformly deep blue with rusty wing bars; no red/green contrast."},{"common_name":"Bunting","scientific_name":"Passerina spp.","rank_hint":"genus","confidence":0.02,"field_marks":"Colorful passerine in family Cardinalidae; male breeding plumage highly distinctive."}],"abstain":false,"abstain_reason":null,"overall_confidence":0.95}
